TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Tafalong, title = Tafalong, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Tafalong} }

S.FORM: alang Tafalong ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Kongbu go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 1,007 buwan, 2,958 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 88% kyan ku 2,609 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 12% kyan ku 349 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis8 3%, binah lihuyan s'uli 4%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Tafalong hya' ga rgyax. tay 'zil na Tafalong hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Tafalong hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Tafalong hya' ga llyung. qalang Tafalong ga maki 2 pqwasan biru. qalang Tafalong ga maki 1 hasisyo. qalang Tafalong ga maki 1 ngasal sexu. qalang Tafalong ga maki 1 kyokay. tay mkyahu' na Tafalong hya' ga Sado. tay 'llaw na Tafalong hya' ga Atomo. tay 'zil na Tafalong hya' ga Laso'ay. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang Tafalong ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Kongbu go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 1,007 buwan, 2,958 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 88% kyan ku 2,609 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 12% kyan ku 349 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis8 3%, binah lihuyan s'uli 4%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Tafalong hya' ga rgyax. tay 'zil na Tafalong hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Tafalong hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Tafalong hya' ga llyung. qalang Tafalong ga maki 2 pqwasan biru. qalang Tafalong ga maki 1 hasisyo. qalang Tafalong ga maki 1 ngasal sexu. qalang Tafalong ga maki 1 kyokay. tay mkyahu' na Tafalong hya' ga Sado. tay 'llaw na Tafalong hya' ga Atomo. tay 'zil na Tafalong hya' ga Laso'ay. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ ta*aloŋ ɣa nija mki s~ɕku kariŋ keŋ atu koŋβu ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *,*** βuwan, *,*** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *,*** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, amis~ɕ* *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ŋas~ɕal ps~ɕatu teɣami ru pqniqan iju. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na ta*aloŋ ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj ʔzil na ta*aloŋ ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na ta*aloŋ ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na ta*aloŋ ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. qalaŋ ta*aloŋ ɣa maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru. qalaŋ ta*aloŋ ɣa maki * ħas~ɕis~ɕjo. qalaŋ ta*aloŋ ɣa maki * ŋas~ɕal s~ɕexu. qalaŋ ta*aloŋ ɣa maki * kjokaj. taj mkjaħuʔ na ta*aloŋ ħjaʔ ɣa s~ɕa*o. taj ʔllaw na ta*aloŋ ħjaʔ ɣa atomo. taj ʔzil na ta*aloŋ ħjaʔ ɣa las~ɕoʔaj. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
